title: Uruguayan Roast Duck Leg with Springy Confit
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring a flavorful roasted duck leg served with a springy confit. Perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Rinse the duck leg and pat dry with paper towels.
Season the duck leg with herbal salt and garlic.
Roast the duck leg in the oven for 30 minutes per kg.
While the duck leg is roasting, heat the confit in a pan over medium heat.
Add the springy to the pan and cook until wilted.
Remove the duck leg from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes.
Serve the duck leg with the springy confit and enjoy!
